task_description:
【强制执行模式】以下任务必须实际执行，不要只描述或规划。你必须使用 write_file、run_shell 等工具动作来完成任务。禁止只输出文字分析。

原始任务：设计一个《无畏契约 Valorant》战绩分析网页的主页设计图。要求：1. 现代电竞风格UI；2. 包含顶部导航栏（Logo、菜单、用户信息）；3. 主要内容区域展示战绩数据（KD比、胜率、近期排位等）；4. 侧边栏显示英雄池和常用角色；5. 整体配色黑色+紫色/蓝色电竞配色。输出为 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建一个 1920x1080 的设计图
width, height = 1920, 1080
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 深黑色电竞背景
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 定义配色方案
color_bg = '#0a0e27'  # 深黑
color_nav = '#1a1f3a'  # 导航栏深蓝
color_accent_purple = '#b55fd8'  # 电竞紫
color_accent_blue = '#0f9fff'  # 电竞蓝
color_text_white = '#ffffff'  # 白色文字
color_text_gray = '#a0a5bb'  # 灰色文字
color_border = '#2d3561'  # 边框

# 尝试加载字体，如果失败使用默认字体
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 36)
    font_large = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 28)
    font_normal = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 20)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 16)
except:
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_large = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_normal = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_small = ImageFont.load_default()

# 1. 绘制顶部导航栏 (80px)
nav_height = 80
for y in range(0, nav_height):
    gradient = int(26 + (10 - 26) * y / nav_height)
    line_color = f'#{gradient:02x}{gradient+15:02x}{gradient+30:02x}'
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, nav_height)], fill=color_nav)

# 导航栏边框
draw.line([(0, nav_height), (width, nav_height)], fill=color_accent_purple, width=2)

# Logo (Valorant 文字)
draw.text((40, 25), "VALORANT", fill=color_accent_purple, font=font_large)

# 导航菜单
menu_items = ["首页", "战绩", "排位", "社区"]
menu_x = 300
for item in menu_items:
    draw.text((menu_x, 30), item, fill=color_text_white, font=font_normal)
    menu_x += 150

# 用户信息区（右上角）
user_info = "用户: Valorant_Pro | 段位: 铂金"
draw.text((width - 380, 25), user_info, fill=color_text_gray, font=font_small)

# 2. 绘制主内容区域和侧边栏
sidebar_width = 280
main_content_x = 20
main_content_y = nav_height + 30
main_content_width = width - sidebar_width - 60
main_content_height = height - nav_height - 50

# 主内容区标题
draw.text((main_content_x, main_content_y), "实时战绩分析", fill=color_accent_blue, font=font_title)
main_content_y += 60

# 绘制三个大数据卡片（KD比、胜率、近期排位）
card_width = (main_content_width - 40) // 3
card_height = 200
card_y = main_content_y

# 卡片数据
cards = [
    {"title": "KD 比率", "value": "1.45", "desc": "近10场平均", "color": color_accent_purple},
    {"title": "胜率", "value": "62%", "desc": "最近50场", "color": color_accent_blue},
    {"title": "当前排位", "value": "铂金 2", "desc": "上升趋势 ↑", "color": color_accent_purple}
]

card_x = main_content_x
for card in cards:
    # 卡片背景
    draw.rectangle(
        [(card_x, card_y), (card_x + card_width - 20, card_y + card_height)],
        fill=color_nav,
        outline=color_border,
        width=2
    )
    # 装饰线
    draw.rectangle(
        [(card_x, card_y), (card_x + card_width - 20, card_y + 4)],
        fill=card["color"]
    )
    # 标题
    draw.text((card_x + 20, card_y + 30), card["title"], fill=color_text_gray, font=font_normal)
    # 数值
    draw.text((card_x + 20, card_y + 80), card["value"], fill=card["color"], font=font_title)
    # 描述
    draw.text((card_x + 20, card_y + 140), card["desc"], fill=color_text_gray, font=font_small)
    card_x += card_width

# 3. 英雄使用统计 (下方)
stats_y = card_y + card_height + 40
draw.text((main_content_x, stats_y), "英雄使用统计", fill=color_accent_blue, font=font_large)
stats_y += 50

# 英雄统计栏
heroes = [
    {"name": "Jett (飞刀", "matches": "28", "winrate": "68%"},
    {"name": "Phoenix (凤凰)", "matches": "22", "winrate": "59%"},
    {"name": "Raze (破坏者)", "matches": "18", "winrate": "56%"}
]

for hero in heroes:
    # 英雄栏背景
    draw.rectangle(
        [(main_content_x, stats_y), (main_content_x + main_content_width - 20, stats_y + 45)],
        fill=color_nav,
        outline=color_border,
        width=1
    )
    # 英雄名
    draw.text((main_content_x + 20, stats_y + 10), hero["name"], fill=color_accent_purple, font=font_normal)
    # 比赛次数
    draw.text((main_content_x + 500, stats_y + 10), f"场次: {hero['matches']}", fill=color_text_gray, font=font_normal)
    # 胜率
    draw.text((main_content_x + 700, stats_y + 10), f"胜率: {hero['winrate']}", fill=color_accent_blue, font=font_normal)
    stats_y += 55

# 4. 绘制右侧边栏 (英雄池)
sidebar_x = width - sidebar_width - 20
sidebar_y = nav_height + 30

# 侧边栏标题
draw.text((sidebar_x, sidebar_y), "常用角色池", fill=color_accent_blue, font=font_large)
sidebar_y += 50

# 英雄池项目
heroes_pool = [
    ("Jett", "进攻型", color_accent_purple),
    ("Raze", "进攻型", color_accent_blue),
    ("Phoenix", "进攻型", color_accent_purple),
    ("Sova", "信息型", color_accent_blue),
    ("Killjoy", "防守型", color_accent_purple)
]

for hero_name, hero_type, hero_color in heroes_pool:
    # 英雄卡片
    draw.rectangle(
        [(sidebar_x, sidebar_y), (sidebar_x + sidebar_width - 40, sidebar_y + 35)],
        fill=color_nav,
        outline=color_border,
        width=1
    )
    # 角色点
    draw.ellipse(
        [(sidebar_x + 10, sidebar_y + 7), (sidebar_x + 25, sidebar_y + 22)],
        fill=hero_color
    )
    # 英雄名
    draw.text((sidebar_x + 35, sidebar_y + 8), hero_name, fill=color_text_white, font=font_normal)
    # 角色类型
    draw.text((sidebar_x + 35, sidebar_y + 22), hero_type, fill=color_text_gray, font=font_small)
    sidebar_y += 45

# 5. 底部装饰
footer_y = height - 40
draw.line([(sidebar_x - 300, footer_y), (width - 20, footer_y)], fill=color_border, width=1)
draw.text((40, footer_y + 5), "数据更新于: 2026-03-08 11:07", fill=color_text_gray, font=font_small)
draw.text((width - 200, footer_y + 5), "© Valorant Stats Pro", fill=color_text_gray, font=font_small)

# 保存图片
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png'
img.save(output_path)
print(f'✓ 设计图已生成: {output_path}')
print(f'✓ 尺寸: {width}x{height}')
print(f'✓ 风格: 电竞黑紫蓝主题')

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 作为 Designer Duck，我需要实际创建设计图而不是描述。使用 Python + Pillow 库绘制电竞风格的 UI 设计，包含导航栏、战绩数据展示区、英雄池侧边栏，配色为黑色+紫蓝色。这是第一步：编写并执行绘制脚本。
